mapper.sql: las.*, lr.id AS lr_id, lr.employee_id, lr.leave_type_id, lr.start_date, lr.end_date, lr.days, lr.status AS leave_status, lr.reason, lr.created_at AS leave_created_at, lr.leave_hours, e.name AS employee_name, lt.name AS leave_type_name
mapper.select: SELECT FROM leave_approval_steps las JOIN leave_requests lr ON las.leave_request_id = lr.id LEFT JOIN employee e ON lr.employee_id = e.id LEFT JOIN leave_type lt ON lr.leave_type_id = lt.id WHERE las.id = #{id}

SELECT FROM leave_approval_steps las JOIN leave_requests lr ON las.leave_request_id = lr.id LEFT JOIN employee e ON lr.employee_id = e.id LEFT JOIN leave_type lt ON lr.leave_type_id = lt.id WHERE las.leave_request_id = #{leaveRequestId} AND las.status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY las.step_order LIMIT 1

SELECT FROM leave_approval_steps las JOIN leave_requests lr ON las.leave_request_id = lr.id LEFT JOIN employee e ON lr.employee_id = e.id LEFT JOIN leave_type lt ON lr.leave_type_id = lt.id WHERE las.leave_request_id = #{leaveRequestId} AND las.status = 'WAITING' AND las.step_order > #{stepOrder} ORDER BY las.step_order LIMIT 1

SELECT FROM leave_approval_steps las JOIN leave_requests lr ON las.leave_request_id = lr.id LEFT JOIN employee e ON lr.employee_id = e.id LEFT JOIN leave_type lt ON lr.leave_type_id = lt.id WHERE las.leave_request_id = #{leaveRequestId} ORDER BY las.step_order

SELECT FROM leave_approval_steps las JOIN leave_requests lr ON las.leave_request_id = lr.id LEFT JOIN employee e ON lr.employee_id = e.id LEFT JOIN leave_type lt ON lr.leave_type_id = lt.id WHERE las.status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY las.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE leave_approval_steps SET status = 'APPROVED', approver_user_id = #{userId}, comment = #{comment}, approved_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PENDING'
UPDATE leave_approval_steps SET status = 'REJECTED', approver_user_id = #{userId}, comment = #{comment}, approved_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PENDING'
UPDATE leave_approval_steps SET status = 'PENDING' WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'WAITING'
UPDATE leave_approval_steps SET status = 'CANCELLED', approved_at = NULL WHERE leave_request_id = #{leaveRequestId} AND status IN ('PENDING', 'WAITING')
